---
pagetitle: "Feature Engineering A-Z | Near-Miss"
image: social-cards/imbalenced-nearmiss.png
---

# Near-Miss {#sec-imbalenced-nearmiss}

::: {style="visibility: hidden; height: 0px;"}
## Near-Miss
:::

The NearMiss method is an method that is used to remove observations from the majority classes.

## Pros and Cons

### Pros

### Cons

## R Examples

## Python Examples
